Failure The target takes full damage, and vitality effects heal it only half as much as normal for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and vitality effects heal it only half as much as normal for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Staff of Necromancy.name: 死灵师法杖 Staff of Necromancy
Staff of Necromancy.description:
这根扭曲且阴森可怖的法杖装饰着骇人的头骨与骨骼图案。持用该法杖时，你在用于识别死灵系魔法的检定中获得+2环境加值。

启动 施法

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]{虚空扭曲}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{邪影触须}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]{衰弱}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fZPCv2VHuM2yPbC8]{耳聋}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xRgU9rrhmGAgG4Rc]{安宁休息}

制作需求 提供所有已列出等级的所有已列出法术各一次施放。

This twisted and grim-looking staff is adorned with hideous skull and bone motifs. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to identify necromancy magic.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mAMEt4FFbdqoRnkN]{Void Warp}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.k34hDOfIIMAxNL4a]{Grim Tendrils}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc]{Enfeeble}
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fZPCv2VHuM2yPbC8]{Deafness}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xRgU9rrhmGAgG4Rc]{Peaceful Rest}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 纳卡扎林与一具在过去一小时内死亡的生物的尸体相邻。

效果 纳卡扎林吞食尸体的一块，并恢复 @Damage[3d6[治疗]] 生命值。

纳卡扎林从任意一具给定的尸体中恢复生命值只能一次。

Requirements Nhakazarin is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect Nhakazarin devours a chunk of the corpse and regains @Damage[3d6[healing]] Hit Points.

Nhakazarin can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Consume Masterpiece.name: 啃食杰作 Consume Masterpiece
Consume Masterpiece.description:
需求 纳卡扎林与C34区域中贝科拉的腐烂雕像相邻

效果 纳卡扎林从雕像上吞食一大块血肉，恢复 @Damage[3d6[治疗]] 生命值，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速 1}。她只能用这个额外动作进行一次啃咬打击或施法。

她每天只能从雕像中进食一次。

Requirements Nhakazarin is adjacent to the rotting statue of Belcorra in area C34

Effect Nhakazarin devours a chunk of flesh from the statue and regains @Damage[3d6[healing]] Hit Points and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened 1} for 1 round. She can use this extra action only to make a jaws Strike or Cast a Spell.

She can feed from the statue only once each day.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并于次日午夜以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼} 的形态复起。

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被食尸鬼（特征）的攻击命中的活着的非精灵生物必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:22] 豁免中成功，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且在每次此类豁免时DC累积降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a ghoul's attack must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
纳卡扎林跳跃至多不超过她速度的一半。这次移动不会触发反应动作（）。

Nhakazarin jumps up to half her Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Nhakazarin.blurb:
女性食尸鬼邪教领袖
Female ghoul cult leader

Flickerwisp.name: 闪火 Flickerwisp

Glow.name: 发光 Glow
Glow.description:
5英尺。闪火本身天生处于隐形状态，但会发出淡黄色的发光，令其灵光范围内成为明亮光照，并使其可见。

5 feet. A flickerwisp is itself naturally invisible, but glows with pale yellow light, casting bright light in the aura and making it visible.

Innocuous.name: 无害 Innocuous
Innocuous.description:
闪火的外貌会在处于困惑（状态）的生物心中产生怪异的印象。带有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）} 状态的生物永远不会用攻击以闪火为目标，除非该生物在过去24小时内曾被闪火的电击能力伤害过。

A flickerwisp's appearance registers strangely in the minds of creatures who are confused. A creature with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} condition never targets a flickerwisp with attacks unless the creature has been damaged by the flickerwisp's shock ability within the last 24 hours.

Magic Immunity.name: 魔法免疫 Magic Immunity
Magic Immunity.description:
闪火免疫除 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HRb2doyaLtaoCfi3]{妖火术}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{造风术}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Quandary} 之外的所有法术。

A flickerwisp is immune to all spells except @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HRb2doyaLtaoCfi3]{Faerie Fire}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Quandary}.

Consume Confusion.name: 吞食困惑 Consume Confusion
Consume Confusion.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 一个位于闪火 15 英尺内的生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）}

效果 闪火以该生物的困惑术为食；同时，其闪烁的身体与不连贯的扭动会使现有的困惑术效果持续不散。

它恢复 @Damage[1d4[治疗]] 生命值，且若该生物的困惑（状态）具有有限的持续时间，则其持续时间延长 1 轮。

Frequency once per round

Requirement A creature within 15 feet of the flickerwisp is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}

Effect The flickerwisp feeds on the creature's confusion, even as its flashing body and disjointed gyrations cause existing confusion effects to persist.

It regains @Damage[1d4[healing]] Hit Points, and if the creature's confused condition has a limited duration, it lasts 1 additional round.

Flicker.name: 闪动 Flicker
Flicker.description:
闪火在相邻生物的头部周围的空中翻涌飞舞，其长度以令人眼花缭乱的一连串分散注意力的闪烁脉动闪光与火花。

该生物必须在一次 @Check[will|dc:18] 豁免中成功，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑} 状态，持续1轮（大失败则为2轮）。若大成功，则该生物在24小时内暂时免疫。

The flickerwisp churns and flits in the air around an adjacent creature's head, and its length flashes and sparkles in a bewildering array of distracting pulsations.

The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:18] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round (2 rounds on a critical failure). On a critical success, the creature is temporarily immune to for 24 hours.

Flickerwisp.publicNotes:
舞动、扭曲的闪火是一种力量较弱但同样恶毒的鬼火。与更危险的同类一样，闪火偏爱在偏僻的沼泽地或荒凉的河流与溪涧地带出没，尤其是在岸边附近——在那里，它们可以伪装成不过是一小群萤火虫。闪火的身体是一段3英尺长、如发丝般的纤维束，当这只生物在空中飘忽穿梭时，其上会闪烁脉动，迸发出诡异的黄色光带与光点。

尽管闪火能品尝恐惧术，并觉得那滋味无比可口，但它并不以这种情绪为食。相反，闪火以困惑术与疑虑求生。当旅人在林中迷失方向而散发出的不安感，正是闪火最爱的佳肴。它们能啜饮这种迷乱感而不暴露自身存在，也不会伤害猎物。最终，闪火会变得过于饥饿，被迫飘近，令猎物陷入困惑术，并大口吞食那未经加工的情绪。闪火会尽力在死亡发生前俯冲离去，而这些折磨者中最娴熟者甚至能让选定的“餐点”存活数日，以小口小口地啜饮困惑术。

The dancing, twisting flickerwisp is a less powerful but no less malevolent type of will-o'-wisp. Like their more dangerous kin, flickerwisps prefer to haunt lonely swamps or stretches of lonely rivers or creeks, particularly near the shorelines where they can pass themselves off as nothing more than a small gathering of fireflies. A flickerwisp's body is a 3-foot-long length of hair-like fibers that flashes and pulses with ribbons and points of eerie yellow light as the creature flits through the air.

While a flickerwisp can taste fear, and finds the flavor delectable, it does not feed on this emotion. Instead, flickerwisps subsist on confusion and doubt. The sense of unease a traveler exudes when they become lost in the woods is flickerwisps' favorite repast. They can sip from this sense of disorientation without betraying their presence or harming their prey. Eventually, the flickerwisps grow too hungry and are compelled to flit closer, confuse their prey, and glut on the raw emotions. Flickerwisps do their best to swoop away before death occurs, and the most skilled of these tormentors can keep a chosen meal alive for days, sipping from confusion in small doses.

Corpselight.name: 尸火 Corpselight

Corpse Sense (Precise) 30 feet.name: 尸体感知（精确）30英尺 Corpse Sense (Precise) 30 feet
Corpse Sense (Precise) 30 feet.description:
尸火可以感知射程内的尸体。这是一种精确感官，可穿透厚度小于5英尺的实体障碍。

A corpselight can sense dead bodies within range. This is a precise sense that functions through solid barriers less than 5 feet thick.

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光虚弱 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
一只暴露在阳光下的尸火会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}，并且无法认领尸体。

A corpselight exposed to sunlight is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and cannot Claim a Corpse.

Wisp Form.name: 鬼火形态 Wisp Form
Wisp Form.description:
当尸火与一具尸体融合时，其生命值降至0时，改为降至1生命值；与此同时，该尸体倒塌在地，而尸火以其鬼火形态现身。

处于鬼火形态时，尸火为超小型，且除占据尸体或飞行外，不能执行任何动作。

以鬼火形态开始其回合的尸火，必须在其回合结束时尝试一次@Check[flat|dc:16|immutable:true]；若失败，则失去1生命值。处于鬼火形态时生命值降至0的尸火会被摧毁。

When a corpselight is reduced to 0 Hit Points while merged with a corpse, it is instead reduced to 1 Hit Point as the corpse collapses to the ground and the corpselight emerges in its wisp form.

While in wisp form, a corpselight is Tiny and can take no actions other than Claim Corpse or Fly.

A corpselight that starts its turn in wisp form must attempt a @Check[flat|dc:16|immutable:true] at the end of its turn; if it fails, it loses 1 Hit Point. A corpselight reduced to 0 Hit Points while in wisp form is destroyed.

Claim Corpse.name: 占据尸体 Claim Corpse
Claim Corpse.description:
先决条件 尸火处于鬼火形态，且与一具在过去24小时内未被尸火占据过的中型或小型尸体相邻

效果 尸火与尸体融合，使尸体站起，并恢复 @Damage[3d6[治疗]] 生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.auJ02rr1Jr88oD3Z]{效果：占据尸体 - 血肉}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.3np7EyJ8pyrVlpie]{效果：占据尸体 - 骸骨}

Prerequisites The corpselight is in wisp form and is adjacent to a Medium or Small corpse that hasn't been claimed by a corpselight in the past 24 hours

Effect The corpselight merges with the corpse, causes the corpse to Stand, and regains @Damage[3d6[healing]] Hit Points.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.auJ02rr1Jr88oD3Z]{Effect: Claim Corpse - Fleshy}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.3np7EyJ8pyrVlpie]{Effect: Claim Corpse - Skeletal}

Death Light.name: 死亡之光 Death Light
Death Light.description:
先决条件 尸火在一具尸体中

效果 尸火从口中与眼中发出一道病态的蓝色光亮术光束，形成一个 @Template[cone|distance:20]。该区域内的所有活着的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:18|traits:damaging-effect] 豁免。若至少有1个生物豁免失败，尸火恢复 @Damage[2d6[healing]] 生命值；任何超过其最大值的部分转化为临时生命值，持续1分钟。

尸火在 [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Death Light]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用死亡之光。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

大失败 该生物受到 @Damage[4d6[void]] 伤害，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

Prerequisites The corpselight is in a corpse

Effect The corpselight emits a sickly blue beam of light from its mouth and eyes in a @Template[cone|distance:20]. All living creatures in this area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:18|traits:damaging-effect] saving throw. If at least 1 creature fails its save, the corpselight regains @Damage[2d6[healing]] Hit Points, gaining any that exceed its maximum as temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute.

The corpselight can't use again for [[/br 1d4 #Recharge Death Light]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d6[void]] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[4d6[void]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Corpselight.publicNotes:
一只饿死的鬼火可能会以冰冷的蓝色发光球体、带着海绵般湿润的形态复起——尸火。尸火会本能地搜寻一具宿主尸体以栖身其中，因为若不藏身于死去的生物体内，它的实体形态会迅速劣化。

A will-o'-wisp that starves to death might rise as a cold, blue, glowing sphere of spongy wetness-a corpselight. A corpselight instinctively seeks out a host corpse to dwell within, as its physical form quickly deteriorates if not hidden within a dead creature.

Gibbering Mouther.name: 呓语之喉 Gibbering Mouther

Gibbering.name: 呓语灵光 Gibbering
Gibbering.description:
60尺。每个在其回合开始时位于呓语之喉60尺内的生物必须尝试一次@Check[will|dc:19]意志豁免。失败时，它们在1轮内变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}。成功时，它们获得1分钟的暂时免疫。

60 feet. Each creature that begins its turn within 60 feet of a gibbering mouther must attempt a @Check[will|dc:19] save. On a failure, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round. On a success, they are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Reactive Gnaw.name: 反应性啃咬 Reactive Gnaw
Reactive Gnaw.description:
触发 一个相邻的生物对呓语之喉造成挥砍伤害。

效果 呓语之喉的伤口张开成另一张巨口。它对触发生物进行一次啃咬打击。

Trigger An adjacent creature deals the gibbering mouther slashing damage.

Effect The gibbering mouther's wound opens into another maw. It makes a jaws Strike against the triggering creature.

Burn Eyes.name: 灼目 Burn Eyes
Burn Eyes.description:
一个因呓语之喉的唾液而受到伤害的生物必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:22] 豁免中成功，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮（若大失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1 轮）。

A creature that takes damage from a gibbering mouther's spittle must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round on a critical failure).

Engulf.name: 吞噬 Engulf
Engulf.description:
@Check[reflex|dc:22|traits:伤害效果], @Damage[3d8[穿刺]], [[/act 逃脱 dc=22]], 破裂 8

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

@Check[reflex|dc:22|traits:damaging-effect], @Damage[3d8[piercing]], [[/act escape dc=22]], Rupture 8

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

Ground Manipulation.name: 地面操控 Ground Manipulation
Ground Manipulation.description:
呓语之喉会使其身体下方的石头和土变得柔软泥泞，并在呓语之喉离开该位置后仍保持 1 分钟。呓语之喉可以轻松穿行这些区域，但其他生物将其视为困难地形。

The gibbering mouther causes stone and earth under its body to grow soft and muddy, remaining so for 1 minute after the mouther moves off the location. A gibbering mouther can move through these areas with ease, but other creatures treat them as difficult terrain.

Gibbering Mouther.publicNotes:
由喋喋不休的嘴巴与渗出体液的肉质污泥构成的无定形团块，呓语之喉是地表或地下所能发现的最怪异生物之一。它们永远饥饿，这些异怪总在寻找下一顿食物，不停吞噬却从不满足。凭借勉强的智力，呓语之喉能够理解甚至说出阿克洛语，但它们极少以可理解的方式这么做。相反，它们无数的嘴巴持续不断地叽里咕噜、嘟囔乱语，形成一股连绵不断的声流，扰乱区域内其他生物的思维模式。

呓语之喉从何而来、如何诞生、为何出现，这些问题都没有答案。它们与更为强大的修格斯在某些方面存在相似之处，因此有人提出两种生物同源的理论；不那么厚道的学者则认为，呓语之喉其实是某个凡人试图创造类似修格斯之物的产物——只是“为什么要这么做”的问题依旧无人能解。还有人相信，呓语之喉是神祇为惩罚某种被遗忘但必然可怖的罪行而将其送入世界。至于呓语之喉自身，对此几乎无话可说——至少说不出任何有意义的内容。学者们为尝试理解呓语之喉的噪声而浪费了无数时间——这些研究不仅让研究者身陷险境，其所得结论充其量也只是自相矛盾、令人困惑。

不论其起源为何，呓语之喉遍布格拉利昂全境。在古老城市与遗迹之下的地城中已有目击记录；在幽暗地域更深层的塞卡米纳与奥尔夫的许多地区也同样有所记载。它们在纳尔-沃斯的上层地区稍为少见，或许是因为那里聚居地众多，而这些聚居地无法容忍呓语之喉的存在。

Amorphous blobs of yammering mouths and oozing, fleshy sludge, gibbering mouthers are among the strangest creatures found either aboveground or below. Perpetually ravenous, these aberrations are always seeking their next meals, ever eating but never sated. With a nominal intelligence, gibbering mouthers can understand and even speak Aklo, but they do so in an intelligible manner only rarely. Instead, their innumerable mouths constantly jabber and babble in a stream of sound that disrupts the thought patterns of other creatures in the area.

Where, how, and why gibbering mouthers originated are questions without answers. They share certain similarities with the much more powerful shoggoths, leading to theories that the two creatures share an origin; less charitable scholars have suggested that the gibbering mouther is instead a mortal's attempt to create something akin to a shoggoth-though the question of why remains unanswered. Still others believe gibbering mouthers were sent to the world by the gods as a punishment for some forgotten but surely terrible transgression. Gibbering mouthers themselves have little to say on the matter-at least, not in any sort of sense. Scholars have wasted countless hours in attempts to make sense of gibbering mouthers' noises-studies that put researchers into danger and give results that are contradictory and confusing at best.

Whatever their origin, gibbering mouthers range the entirety of Golarion. Sightings have been recorded in dungeons below ancient cities and ruins as well as many regions of the deeper Darklands layers of Sekamina and Orv. They are somewhat less common in the upper region of Nar-Voth, perhaps due to the prevalence of settlements that don't tolerate gibbering mouthers' presence.

Jarelle Kaldrian.name: 贾瑞尔·卡德瑞恩 Jarelle Kaldrian
Jarelle Kaldrian.tokenName: 贾瑞尔·卡德瑞恩 Jarelle Kaldrian

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
区域 C13

一只典型的幽灵（特征）只能离它被杀害之处或其盘踞之地不远。典型限制为120英尺。有些幽灵（特征）则并非受缚于某个地点，而是被束缚在对它而言意义重大的房间、建筑、物品或生物上。

Area C13

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
移除这个房间的桌子和工具会让贾蕾尔得以前往来世。

当一个幽灵（特征）被摧毁时，它会在其所束缚的地点内于[[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后重塑，且完全痊愈。只有当有人确定其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止其灵魂休息的事物时，幽灵（特征）才能被永久摧毁。

Removing this room's tables and tools allows Jarelle to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Malevolent Possession.name: 恶意占据 Malevolent Possession
Malevolent Possession.description:
Jarelle 试图占据一个相邻的有形生物。这具有与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{占据术} 法术相同的效果（法术DC为22），但由于 Jarelle 没有实体身体，她不受该法术此项限制的影响。

Jarelle attempts to possess an adjacent corporeal creature. This has the same effect as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{Possession} spell (with a spell DC of 22), except since Jarelle doesn't have a physical body, she is unaffected by that restriction of the spell.

Poisoned Breath.name: 剧毒吐息 Poisoned Breath
Poisoned Breath.description:
雅蕾尔呼出一团@Template[cone|distance:15]的剧毒雾霭，造成@Damage[5d6[poison]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免；在大失败时，目标还会受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，持续24小时）。

随后，她在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Poisoned Breath]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用剧毒吐息。

Jarelle exhales a @Template[cone|distance:15] of toxic mist that deals @Damage[5d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic|options:area-effect] save; on a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 24 hours).

She then can't use Poisoned Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Poisoned Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Jarelle Kaldrian.blurb:
女性人类，幽灵图书管理员
Female human ghost librarian
Jarelle Kaldrian.prototypeToken: 贾瑞尔·卡德瑞恩 Jarelle Kaldrian

Aller Rosk.name: 阿勒·罗斯克 Aller Rosk

Consume Tattooed Flesh.name: 啃食刺青尸体 Consume Tattooed Flesh
Consume Tattooed Flesh.description:
需求 Aller与一块带纹身的碎肉相邻，或与一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物尸体相邻

Aller吞食一口血肉并恢复 @Damage[4d6[治疗]] 生命值。如果这块血肉带有纹身，他还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速 1}，并且可以使用这个额外动作进行一次啃咬 打击。

随后Aller在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Consume Flesh]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用啃食尸体。他随身携带一块带纹身的血肉。

Requirements Aller is adjacent to a tattooed scrap of flesh or to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour

Aller devours a bite of flesh and regains @Damage[4d6[healing]] Hit Points. If the piece of flesh was tattooed, he is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened 1} and can use this extra action to make a jaws Strike.

Aller then can't Consume Flesh for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Consume Flesh]]{1d4 rounds}. He has one piece of tattooed flesh on his person.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何好处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜作为一只 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼（特征）} 复起。

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被阿勒的攻击命中的活着的、非精灵生物都必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:22] 豁免中成功，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且在每次此类豁免时DC都会累计降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by Aller's attack must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
阿勒跳跃至最多其速度的一半。此移动不会触发反应动作（）。

Aller jumps up to half his Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Aller Rosk.blurb:
男性食尸鬼刺青艺术家
Male ghoul tattoo artist

Grothlut.name: 胶化人 Grothlut

Disgusting Demise.name: 恶心的死法 Disgusting Demise
Disgusting Demise.description:
当胶化人被降至0生命值时，它的消化器官破裂，向所有处于@Template[emanation|distance:30]内的生物喷涌出炼金酸液与毒素。区域内的每个生物必须在一次@Check[fortitude|dc:19]豁免中成功，否则将受到@Damage[2d6[acid]]伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（大失败时伤害加倍并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。

When the grothlut is reduced to 0 Hit Points, its digestive organs rupture, unleashing alchemical acid and poison upon all creatures in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:19] save or take @Damage[2d6[acid]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (double damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Piteous Moan.name: 悲惨哀鸣 Piteous Moan
Piteous Moan.description:
60英尺。

每个非胶化人生物进入或在该区域内开始其回合时，必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:17] 豁免检定，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（大失败时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}）。随后该生物获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。

胶化人可以解消该光环。

胶化人通常直到其感官到非胶化人生物的存在才会开始呻吟，并且一旦它不再感官到任何此类生物，通常就会停止。

60 feet.

Each nongrothlut creature that enters or starts its turn within the area must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:17] saving throw or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). The creature then becomes temporarily immune for 1 minute.

The grothlut can Dismiss this aura.

A grothlut usually does not begin moaning until it senses the presence of a non-grothlut creature, and it usually stops once it doesn't sense any more such creatures.

Grothlut.publicNotes:
如蛞蝓般的憎邪，胶化人是塑肉仪式过程所剩下的丑陋残渣。尽管它们的头部与躯干隐约呈类人形态，但手臂如橡胶般柔软，笨拙地垂在身侧摇摆。作为可悲的生物，当其他生物靠近时它们会凄厉呻吟，或许是其心智最后的残存正恳求从这骇人的扭曲形体中解脱。

许多塑肉者认为胶化人是一项造物的失败，因为转化几乎彻底抹去了意识。也有人不同意，认为扭曲生物的心智反而更有用处，因为它会变得顺从且易于驱赶。哈艮地的邪教徒通常让胶化人充当守卫，缓慢巡逻其聚居地的边缘。一旦就位，胶化人便可作为粗糙的突击兵使用，被释放出去以削弱敌军，随后更珍贵的武者再涉入战场，将那些被胶化人爆裂的内脏与血肉所熏得作呕的敌人砍倒。

魔法事故、神祇诅咒与未经测试的科技都能对身体造成剧烈变形；在格拉利昂乃至其外的世界中，这些现象皆极为猖獗。经历了如此剧烈变化、以至于不再能被视为与先前相同族裔的生物，被称为塑肉仪式造物。此类存在相当罕见，而其令人不安的外貌常会引起旁人惊骇的反应。

有些生物沉溺于借由塑肉仪式让被击败的敌人彻底堕落。尽管这项技艺最初由恶魔领主哈艮地传授给凡人，但凡人数千上万年来不断改造并完善该方法。塑肉工匠把敌人折磨于翻涌的魔法试剂大缸之中，将其血肉与心灵一并重塑为骇人而怪诞之物。

Sluglike abominations, grothluts are grotesque dregs of the fleshwarping process. While their head and torso are vaguely humanoid, their arms are rubbery and move awkwardly at their sides. Wretched creatures, they moan piteously when other creatures are near, perhaps as the last remnants of their mind pleads to be free from their horrid warped form.

Many fleshwarpers consider the grothlut to be a failure of a creation, as the transformation all but stamps out consciousness. Others disagree, arguing that warping the creature's mind makes it all the more useful, since it becomes pliable and easy to herd. Cultists of Haagenti typically use grothluts as guardians that slowly patrol the edges of their enclaves. Once in position, grothluts can be used as crude shock troops, unleashed to soften enemy forces before more valuable warriors wade in and cut down the enemies who have been nauseated by the grothluts' exploded organs and flesh.

Magical mishaps, divine curses, and untested technology are all capable of wreaking drastic transformations on the body, and are all rampant on the world of Golarion and beyond. Creatures that have undergone changes so drastic they no longer can be considered the same ancestry as they were before are known as fleshwarps. These beings are rare, and their unsettling appearance often provokes horrified responses from other people.

Some creatures revel in the total degradation of their defeated foes through fleshwarping. Though the technique was originally taught to mortals by the demon lord Haagenti, mortals have spent eons modifying and perfecting the method. Fleshcrafters torture their enemies in vats of churning magical reagents, reshaping their flesh and psyche alike into horrid and monstrous things.

Blood of Belcorra.name: 贝科拉之血 Blood of Belcorra
Blood of Belcorra.tokenName: 贝科拉之血 Blood of Belcorra

Gauntlight Beam.name: 凄凉之光射线 Gauntlight Beam
Gauntlight Beam.description:
触发 一个位于夜晚的活体生物在区域A11结束其回合

效果 一个可怖的贝科拉影像，似乎由新鲜血液构成，从地板上的血渍中升起，并如同灯塔般原地旋转。冰冷的蓝色光束从贝科拉的双眼与张开的口中射出，导致水疱与衰败在血肉上蔓延。位于以区域A11中心为起点的@Template[burst|distance:30]内的活体生物必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:20|traits:damaging-effect]豁免。

随后，此灵异现象进行先攻掷骰。

大成功或大失败 成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到@Damage[1d8[void]]伤害。

失败 该生物受到@Damage[(1d8+6)[void]]伤害，并在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

大成功或大失败 失败 该生物受到@Damage[(2d8+6)[void]]伤害，并在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}，随后在1轮内目眩。

Trigger A living creature ends its turn in area A11 at night

Effect A ghastly image of Belcorra, seemingly composed of fresh blood, rises from the bloodstain on the floor and rotates in place like a lighthouse. Beams of cold blue light shine from Belcorra's eyes and open mouth, causing blisters and decay to spread across flesh. Living creatures within a @Template[burst|distance:30] from the center of area A11 must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20|traits:damaging-effect] save.

The haunt then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d8[void]] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(1d8+6)[void]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[(2d8+6)[void]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round then dazzled for 1 round.

Blood of Belcorra.disable:
@Check[thievery|dc:22|name:擦去血迹] (trained) 以擦去足够的血迹来扰乱闹鬼的死灵能量，或 @Check[宗教|dc:20|name:驱除闹鬼] (trained) 以驱除闹鬼

@Check[thievery|dc:22|name:Wipe Away Blood] (trained) to wipe away enough of the bloodstain to disrupt the haunt's necromantic energies, or @Check[religion|dc:20|name:Excorcise Haunt] (trained) to exorcise the haunt
Blood of Belcorra.hazarddescription:
贝科拉的血腥影像浮现，放射出吸魂的光亮术，随后从房间内的活体生物身上吸入鲜血。

A bloody image of Belcorra arises, emits a soul‑draining light, then inhales blood from living creatures in the room.
Blood of Belcorra.reset:
如果该闹鬼因被禁用或通过伤害被摧毁，贝科拉的血腥魅影会以螺旋状向上喷涌，浸透通往区域 A25 的活板门，然后通过钥匙孔向上吸入，使 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁} 的盗窃 DC 降至 @Check[thievery|dc:20|name:Pick Trap Door|traits:action:pick-a-lock,skill,manipulate]。

在下一次日出时，血液会再度向下流回此房间，闹鬼重置。一旦拉斯达·范克维尔从区域 D9 被救出，该闹鬼将被永久摧毁。

If the haunt is disabled or destroyed through damage, the bloody phantom of Belcorra sprays upward in a spiral, dousing the trap door leading to area A25 before draining upward through the keyhole, which reduces the Thievery DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock} to @Check[thievery|dc:20|name:Pick Trap Door|traits:action:pick-a-lock,skill,manipulate].

At the next sunrise, the blood drains back down to this room and the haunt resets. The haunt is destroyed permanently once Lasda Venkervale is rescued from area D9.
Blood of Belcorra.routine:
（1动作）血腥影像张开嘴，似乎吸气，从其中心A11区域90尺内其视觉线中的1个生物的身体中抽取鲜血。被选为目标的生物必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:20|traits:damaging-effect]豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功该生物不受影响。

成功该生物受到@Damage[1d10[bleed]]。

失败该生物受到@Damage[(1d10+6)[bleed]]伤害。

大成功或大失败 失败该生物受到@Damage[(2d10+6)[bleed]]伤害，并在其流血期间处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}。

(1 action) The bloody image opens its mouth and appears to inhale, drawing blood from the body of one creature in its line of sight within 90 feet from the center of area A11. The creature targeted must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20|traits:damaging-effect] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d10[bleed]].

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(1d10+6)[bleed]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[(2d10+6)[bleed]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} as long as it's bleeding.
Blood of Belcorra.prototypeToken: 贝科拉之血 Blood of Belcorra

Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City.name: 《明日末日——震颤之城》 Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City
Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City.tokenName: 明日的厄运 Doom's of Tomorrow

Apocalypse Beam.name: 天启射线 Apocalypse Beam
Apocalypse Beam.description:
触发 一个生物快步进入距立体景观壁龛背面10英尺以内

效果 陷阱向该生物发射其对应的天启射线。

Trigger A creature steps within 10 feet of the back of a diorama alcove

Effect The trap fires its corresponding apocalypse beam at that creature.

Shattering Beam.name: 碎裂光束 Shattering Beam
Shattering Beam.description:
一个生物触发了天启射线，并且在10英尺内。这是反应动作（）的一部分。

A creature triggerd Apocalypse Beam and is within 10 feet. This is part of the Reaction.

Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City.disable:
• 两种选择

  1. DC 20 盗窃（受训）以在凄凉灯塔的模型触发之前迅速将其停用

  • DC 23 潜行（受训）在不触发陷阱的情况下悄悄绕过它

  • Two Options

  1. DC 20 Thievery (trained) to quickly deactivate the model of Gauntlight before it triggers

  • DC 23 Stealth (trained) to creep by a trap without triggering it
Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City.hazarddescription:
一座小型立体模型，展现一座城市正面临悲惨的危难。

毁灭的声响从立体模型中升起，一道闪烁的能量光束从凄凉灯塔的微型模型中向外刺出。

在一名玩家观看立体模型后宣读

立体模型呈现出一幕场景：艾巴萨罗姆城在贝科拉的想象中遭遇一场奇诡的末日。你看到一段小型幻象：巨大的土震撼动，大地在轰鸣中裂开，将整座城市吞没。

一座微小的凄凉灯塔仿佛远在数里之外，矗立在每一幕场景的边缘。

A small diorama of a city facing a tragic peril.

The sounds of devastation rise from the diorama, and a beam of shimmering energy lances outward from the tiny model of Gauntlight.

Read after a player looks at the diorama

The diorama presents a scene depicting the city of Absalom in a fanciful doom from Belcorra’s imagination. You see a minor illusion of massive earth shakes, thunderous splits in the earth swallowing up the city.

A tiny Gauntlight, as though miles distant, sits at the edge of each scene.
Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City.reset:
微缩景观陷阱会在1小时后自动重置。

The diorama trap resets automatically after 1 hour.
Doom's of Tomorrow - Shaken City.prototypeToken: 明日的厄运 Doom's of Tomorrow

Canker Cultist.name: 溃烂教徒 Canker Cultist

Occult Prepared Spells.name: 神秘 备妥法术 Occult Prepared Spells

Chill Touch.name: 恐吓之触 Chill Touch
Chill Touch.description:
将虚空能量虹吸入自身，你的手散发出苍白的黑暗。你的接触会削弱活物并扰乱不死生物，甚至可能使其逃离。该效果取决于目标是活物还是不死生物。

  • 活体生物 该法术造成等同于1d4加上你的施法调整值的虚空伤害。目标进行一次基础强韧豁免，但若大失败，则还会在1轮内承受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。
  • 不死生物 若强韧豁免失败，目标在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。若大失败，目标还会在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，除非其通过一次意志豁免。

升阶（+1） 对活体生物造成的虚空伤害提高1d4。

Siphoning void energy into yourself, your hand radiates a pale darkness. Your touch weakens the living and disorients undead, possibly even causing them to flee. The effect depends on whether the target is living or undead.

  • Living Creature The spell deals void damage equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting modifier. The target attempts a basic Fortitude save, but is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round on a critical failure.
  • Undead Creature The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round on a failed Fortitude save. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round unless it succeeds at a Will save.

Heightened (+1) The void damage to living creatures increases by 1d4.

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你大声喊出一道难以忽视的命令。你可以命令目标靠近你、逃离（如同它具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑（状态）}状态）、放开它正握着的东西、卧倒@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或原地不动。在它服从你的命令之前，它不能延迟或进行任何反应动作（）。这些效果取决于目标的意志豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在其下个回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用一个单动作来按你的命令行事。

大失败 目标必须在其下个回合使用全部动作来服从你的命令。

升阶（5环） 你最多可以以10个生物为目标。

You shout a command that's hard to ignore. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as if it had the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it has obeyed your command. The effects depend on the target's Will save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command.

Critical Failure The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

Heightened (5th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Daze.name: 眩晕术 Daze
Daze.description:
你使目标的心智变得混乱，并以一道精神冲击使其陷入眩晕术。冲击造成等同于你的施法能力调整值的精神伤害；目标必须尝试一次基础意志豁免。若目标在豁免中大失败，它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害提高 1d6。

You cloud the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals mental damage equal to your spellcasting ability modifier; the target must attempt a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
黑暗触须从你的指尖卷出，穿过空气疾驰。你对直线中的活体生物造成2d4虚空伤害以及@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。直线中的每个活体生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半的虚空伤害，且不承受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受全部伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚空伤害与双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 虚空伤害增加2d4，且持续流血伤害增加1。

Tendrils of darkness curl out from your fingertips and race through the air. You deal 2d4 void damage and @Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]] damage to living creatures in the line. Each living creature in the line must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the void damage and no persistent bleed damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes double void damage and double persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+1) The void damage increases by 2d4, and the persistent bleed damage increases by 1.

Harm.name: 伤害术 Harm
Harm.description:
你引导虚空能量来伤害生者或治疗不死生物。若目标为活体生物，你对其造成1d8虚空伤害，并且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。若目标为自愿的不死生物，你恢复等量的生命值。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域以及其他参数。

1 (姿势) 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (verbal, 姿势) 该法术的射程为30尺。若你在治疗一个不死生物，将恢复的生命值提高8点。

3 (材料, verbal, 姿势) 你在30尺的涌动范围内驱散虚空能量。这会以区域内所有活体与不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或伤害的数值提高1d8，并且2动作版本的额外治疗提高8点。

You channel void energy to harm the living or heal the undead. If the target is a living creature, you deal 1d8 void damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. If the target is a willing undead creature, you restore that amount of Hit Points. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 (somatic) The spell has a range of touch.

2 (verbal, somatic) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing an undead creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (material, verbal, somatic) You disperse void energy in a 30-foot emanation. This targets all living and undead creatures in the area.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Mage Hand.name: 法师之手 Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description:
你创造出一只魔法手，可以是隐形的或幽灵般的，它抓住目标物体并将其缓慢移动最多20英尺。由于你在使物体悬浮，你可以将其向任意方向移动。当你维持该法术时，你可以让该物体额外移动20英尺。如果该法术结束时物体仍在空中，物体会坠落。

升阶（3环）你可以以负载为1或更低的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以负载为1或更低的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环）射程增加至60英尺，且你可以以负载为2或更低的无主物体为目标。

You create a single magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and moves it slowly up to 20 feet. Because you're levitating the object, you can move it in any direction. When you Sustain the Spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Phantom Pain.name: 幻痛术 Phantom Pain
Phantom Pain.description:
幻痛折磨着目标，造成2d4精神伤害以及1d4持续精神伤害。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受全部初始伤害但不承受持续伤害，且该法术立即结束。

失败 目标承受全部初始伤害与持续伤害，且目标为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心1}。若目标从恶心中恢复，持续伤害结束且该法术结束。

大成功或大失败 失败 同失败，但目标为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d4，持续伤害增加1d4。

@Damage[(@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]{随等级增长的持续精神伤害}

Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and 1d4 persistent mental damage. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes full initial damage but no persistent damage, and the spell ends immediately.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If the target recovers from being Sickened, the persistent damage ends and the spell ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d4 and the persistent damage by 1d4.

@Damage[(@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]{Scaling Persistent Mental Damage}

Ray of Enfeeblement.name: 衰弱射线 Ray of Enfeeblement
Ray of Enfeeblement.description:
一道削弱敌人力量的射线从你手中闪现。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。若你成功，则该生物进行一次强韧豁免以决定该法术的效果。若你的攻击掷骰为大成功，则使用其豁免结果差一级的结果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}。

A ray that saps a foe's strength flashes from your hand. Attempt a ranged spell attack against the target. If you succeed, that creature attempts a Fortitude save to determine the spell's effect. If your attack roll is a critical success, use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of its save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}.

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一个射程内松散、无人看管且负载为1或更低的物体掷向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你命中，你造成钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——取决于你掷出的物体——其数值等于1d6加上你的施法能力调整值。被掷出的物品不具有任何会影响该攻击或伤害的特定特征或魔法属性。

大成功或大失败 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成全额伤害。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage-as appropriate for the object you hurled-equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Lump of Decayed Flesh Strung on a Neckla.name: 腐烂肉块项链 Lump of Decayed Flesh Strung on a Necklace

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 溃烂教徒与一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物的尸体相邻，或正携带一块经过特殊处理的腐烂肉块。

效果 溃烂教徒吞食一块尸体或那块腐烂肉块并恢复生命值。他们通过食用在过去1小时内死亡的生物的血肉恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 生命值，通过腐烂肉块恢复 @Damage[2d6[healing]] 生命值。

教徒从任意一具给定的尸体中恢复生命值只能一次。

Requirements The Canker cultist is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour, or is carrying a specially prepared lump of decaying flesh.

Effect The Canker cultist devours a chunk of the corpse or the lump of decaying flesh and regains Hit Points. They regain @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points from consuming the flesh of a creature that died within the last hour, and @Damage[2d6[healing]] Hit Points from the lump.

The cultist can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

阶段 1 携带者，无任何不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜复起为一只 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼}。

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被溃烂教徒的攻击命中的活体、非精灵生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:20] 豁免，否则将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，且在每次此类豁免时 DC 累积降低 1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a Canker cultist's attack must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
邪教徒跳跃至其速度的一半。此移动不会触发反应动作（）。

The cultist jumps up to half its Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Canker Cultist.blurb:
食尸鬼狂热者
Ghoul zealot

Dead Acolyte A.name: 死亡侍祭 A Dead Acolyte A

The wood golem makes up to four splinter Strikes, each against a different target.

These attacks count toward the wood golem's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the wood golem makes all of its attacks.

Wood Golem.publicNotes:
木魔像通常会被塑造成模糊的人形，几乎就像用柴火碎料与被丢弃的树瘤东拼西凑而成。木魔像带有雕刻纹样等艺术性点缀，或被雕成不同类型的生物以迎合其主人品味的情况则不太常见。虽然人们知道有些富有的赞助者会委托工匠将木魔像精雕细琢，使其酷似自己或祖先，以同时达到防护与满足虚荣心的双重目的，但大多数木魔像匠人并不费这个工夫。德鲁伊以及守护林地的生物（如树人）通常将木魔像视为一种冒犯或亵渎，近似于类人生物在面对食腐魔像或血肉魔像时常会产生的恐惧感。因此，尽管木魔像的外观与妖精或德鲁伊的圣地在主题上十分契合，但在这些地点见到此类生物担任守卫仍然十分罕见。

魔像的形态与结构仅受其制作者的力量与创造力所限。历经多个年代，技艺高超的头脑与双手不断完善制造特定类型魔像的配方，从而促成了常见形态的发展。此处所介绍的各类魔像，其制造秘辛可能被珍藏于著名魔像工坊的殿堂之内，或尘封在诸多世界的遗忘图书馆中。

Wood golems are often given vaguely humanoid shapes, almost as if cobbled together from scraps of firewood and discarded burls. It's less common for wood golems to have artistic embellishments such as engraved patterns, or to be carved in the shapes of different types of creatures to meet the tastes of their owners. While wealthy patrons have been known to commission wood golems to be painstakingly carved to resemble themselves or their ancestors, to serve dual purposes of protection and ego bolstering, most wood golem crafters don't bother. Druids and creatures who protect woodlands, such as arboreals, typically see wood golems as an affront or an abomination, akin to the horror humanoids often feel when facing a carrion or flesh golem. As a result, it is rare to see such creatures serving as guardians for fey or druidic holy sites, despite the thematic match between the wood golem's appearance and such locations.

The shape and structure of a golem are limited only by the power and creativity of its crafter. Over the ages, skilled minds and hands have refined the formulas for creating specific types of golems, resulting in the development of common forms. The secrets of creating the types of golems presented here may be guarded within the halls of famous golemworks or the forgotten libraries of many worlds.

Belly Grease.description:
泥蛙从其腹侧腺体分泌出滑腻的油脂，覆盖其身下以及以其为中心的5尺放射范围内的地面，使受影响的区域变为不平整的地面，持续10分钟，随后其会干燥成恶臭的硬壳。穿越这层黏液进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}的DC为18。

The slurk extrudes a slippery grease from its ventral glands to coat the floor under it and in a 5-foot emanation, turning the affected area into uneven ground for 10 minutes, after which it dries to a putrid crust. The DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance} across the slime is 18.

Entangling Slime.name: 纠缠黏液 Entangling Slime
Entangling Slime.description:
被泥蛙的黏液喷射击中的生物会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 并在1小时内或直到黏液被移除前，速度承受–5尺减值。

被缠住的生物或与该生物相邻的生物累计进行三次交互动作即可移除黏液。这些动作不需要连续进行，也不需要由同一个生物完成。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.jQmfZcPD6xVYx5nb]{效果：缠绕黏液}

A creature struck by a slurk's slime squirt becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and takes a –5-foot penalty to Speed for 1 hour or until the slime is removed.

The slime can be removed with a total of three Interact actions by the entangled creature or creatures adjacent to the creature. These actions don't need to be consecutive or made by the same creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.jQmfZcPD6xVYx5nb]{Effect: Entangling Slime}

Slurk.publicNotes:
泥蛙是一种黏稠、长有獠牙的蛙兽，常见于地下巢穴与洞窟之中。它有两根巨大的獠牙，用来戳刺猎物并与竞争的泥蛙纠缠搏斗。凭借泥蛙天生攀爬墙壁、轻松附着在天花板上的能力，粗心的洞窟探险者很容易就会被这些可怖的象牙獠牙刺中要害。

泥蛙会从其苍白的白色皮肤中分泌两种截然不同、气味恶臭的分泌物。泥蛙背部的大型脓疱会滴落一种黏性的、树脂状的黏液，这种黏液一接触空气便会迅速硬化。泥蛙通过绷紧皮肤，能将这些脓疱朝入侵者的方向爆裂开来，使敌人被黏糊糊的胶质覆盖，并严重限制他们抵御该怪物其他攻击的能力，其中也包括其另一种分泌物的效果。沿着泥蛙腹侧分布的腺体会排出一种极其滑溜且腐臭的油腻术，这能保护泥蛙免受其背部黏液造成的定身效果影响，同时也让它极难被擒抱与捕获。判断附近是否有泥蛙的最佳方式，是寻找这种油腻术干结后形成的硬块——它们会在洞窟角落以及泥蛙在两餐之间休息的岩石堆中积累并干燥。

人们认为泥蛙是矮人一次失败的尝试的后裔——他们试图驯化并繁育大型地下蛙类，作为食物与劳作动物。尽管显然以失败告终，其他生活在地下的群体却常常与泥蛙结为伙伴。这些黏稠的蛙兽对狗头人（page 210）而言极具吸引力，如今狗头人已将泥蛙驯养并训练为强力的坐骑与守卫。虽然其他生物，尤其是沼蜍人（特征），有时也会训练泥蛙担任守卫，但使用这些生物最多的仍是狗头人。骑乘泥蛙的狗头人往往会躲藏在洞窟上方的岩架处，利用高度与突袭的优势，以远程攻击骚扰敌人。狗头人骑手也会利用泥蛙的攀爬能力，从洞穴墙壁上向敌人发起冲锋。

The slurk is a sticky, tusked frog-beast found in underground lairs and caves. It has two massive tusks that it uses to gore prey and tangle with rival slurks. With the slurk's natural ability to climb walls and cling effortlessly to ceilings, it can be easy for unwary cave explorers to end up on the wrong end of these formidable ivory tusks.

Slurks exude two very different types of foul-smelling secretions from their pale white skin. Large pustules on the slurk's back drip a sticky resin-like slime that quickly hardens upon exposure to air. By flexing its skin, the slurk can burst these pustules in the direction of intruders, covering its foes in sticky goo and severely limiting their ability to withstand the monster's other attacks, including the effects of its other secretion. Glands along the slurk's ventral side excrete an incredibly slippery and fetid grease, which protects the slurk from the immobilizing effects of its own back slime but also has the added benefit of making it extremely difficult to grapple and capture. The best way to discover if a slurk is in the vicinity is to look for hard clumps of such grease, which accumulate and dry in cave corners and amid rock piles where slurks rest between meals.

Slurks are thought to be descendants of a failed dwarven attempt to domesticate and breed large subterranean frogs as food and labor animals. Despite this apparent failure, others who live underground often befriend slurks. The sticky frog-beasts have proven extremely desirable to kobolds (page 210), who now domesticate and train slurks as powerful mounts and guardians. While other creatures, particularly boggards, sometimes train slurks to serve as guardians, kobolds remain those who use these creatures the most. A kobold mounted on a slurk will often hide in the upper ledges of a cave, using the advantages of height and surprise to harry foes with ranged attacks. Kobold riders also take advantage of the slurk's ability to climb, and charge at their enemies from the walls of a cavern.
Slurk.allSaves: +12 to fortitude saves vs. Grapple, Reposition, or Shove

Giant Scorpion.publicNotes:
这些巨大的、令人恐惧的蛛形纲动物通常从头到尾根长达8英尺。巨蝎是多种沙漠栖居生物喜爱的驮兽与战兽，尤其是科洛斯。不过，它们最常见的遭遇地点仍是在野外。在那里，它们会在山坡洞穴中筑巢，或在浅浅的沙层下掘洞潜伏，等待猎物游荡靠近。

蝎子是沙漠、森林、稀树草原与荒地中的几丁质灾厄，是致命的蛛形纲动物，拥有强有力的螯与令人痛苦的毒刺。几乎在每一种气候中都能找到蝎子；它们以耐心的隐匿与原始的力量相结合来猎捕猎物。多数蝎子生活在地下洞穴中，要么作为独行猎手，要么作为更大群落的一部分。这些蛛形纲动物令人畏惧且极度危险，以至于在许多文化中，它们被视为神祇，或作为兼具死亡与免于该死亡之保护的二元象征。

These massive, terrifying arachnids are typically 8 feet long from head to the base of the tail. Giant scorpions are the favored pack animals and war beasts of various desert-dwelling creatures, particularly kholos. They are most commonly encountered in the wild, however. There they lair in mountainside caves or burrow beneath shallow layers of sand where they lie in wait for prey to wander near.

Chitinous scourges of deserts, forests, savannas, and badlands, scorpions are deadly arachnids with powerful pincers and a painful sting. Scorpions can be found in nearly every climate, where they hunt their prey with a mixture of patient stealth and raw strength. Most scorpions live in underground burrows, either as lone hunters or part of a larger colony. These arachnids are so feared and dangerous that in many cultures, they are treated as deities or dualistic symbols of both death and protection from said death.

Ghoul.name: 食尸鬼（特征） Ghoul

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼（特征）与一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物的尸体相邻。

效果 食尸鬼（特征）吞食尸体的一块肉，并恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 生命值。

它从任意一具特定尸体中恢复生命值只能一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并在下一个午夜作为一只 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼} 苏醒。

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralysis.name: 麻痹 Paralysis
Paralysis.description:
任何被食尸鬼（特征）的攻击命中的活体、非精灵生物必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:15] 豁免中成功，否则成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免，并且该DC在每次此类豁免时累积降低1。

Any living, non-elf creature hit by a ghoul's attack must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
食尸鬼跃起至多其速度的一半。此移动不会触发反应动作。

The ghoul jumps up to half its Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Ghoul.publicNotes:
食尸鬼是贪婪的亡灵，会出没于墓地并吞食尸体。

很少有生物能比被称为食尸鬼的食肉亡灵更常见于诸如荒僻墓地与破败地窖等邪恶之地。

Ghouls are ravenous undead who haunt graveyards and eat corpses.

Few creatures are more ubiquitous to sinister locations such as lonely graveyards and ruined crypts than the flesh-eating undead known as ghouls.

Chandriu Invisar.name: 尚德里·尹萨 Chandriu Invisar

Site Bound.name: 束缚之地 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
区域 C36 和 C37。

典型的幽灵（特征）只能离它被杀害之处或其徘徊之地不远。一个典型的限制是120英尺。有些幽灵（特征）则不是被束缚于某个地点，而是被束缚于对它而言特殊的房间、建筑、物品或生物。

Area C36 and C37.

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
要让钱德丽乌永久地获得休息，英雄必须通过一次成功的 @Check[diplomacy|dc:21|name:Convince Chandriu|overrideTraits:true] 检定来说服她停止对沃鲁克的痴恋。

无论这次检定结果如何，钱德丽乌都会勃然大怒并发动攻击；但若交涉检定成功，她在战斗期间会在 10 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。如果在她迟缓时被击败，她将获得休息。

当一个 幽灵（特征） 被摧毁时，它会在 [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} 后于其所绑定的位置内重新形成，并完全恢复。只有当有人查明其存在的原因，并纠正任何阻止该灵魂获得休息的事物时，一个 幽灵（特征） 才能被永久摧毁。

To put Chandriu to rest permanently, a hero must convince her to stop pining over Volluk with a successful @Check[diplomacy|dc:21|name:Convince Chandriu|overrideTraits:true] check.

Regardless of the result of this check, Chandriu flies into a rage and attacks, but if the Diplomacy check is successful, she is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 10 rounds while she fights. If defeated while she is slowed, she is put to rest.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Despairing Cry.name: 绝望哭喊 Despairing Cry
Despairing Cry.description:
钱德丽乌因自己的失落与背叛而绝望哀嚎，迫使每个处于 @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30尺} 内的活着的生物尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:24|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed] 意志豁免。

失败时，生物会变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（大失败时为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}），持续1轮，因为他们被对自己错失机会的悲伤所淹没。成功时，生物在1分钟内暂时免疫钱德丽乌的绝望哭喊。

Chandriu wails in despair at her loss and betrayal, forcing each living creature within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} to attempt a @Check[will|dc:24|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed] save.

On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} on a critical failure) for 1 round as they are overcome with sadness over their own missed opportunities. On a success, a creature is temporarily immune to Chandriu's Despairing Cry for 1 minute.

Stonescale Spirits.name: 石鳞之魂 Stonescale Spirits

Confusing Confrontation.name: 令人困惑的对峙 Confusing Confrontation
Confusing Confrontation.description:
触发 一名生物进入房间中央一处被瓦砾完全或部分填满的方格

效果 六只幽灵般的狗头人伴随着诡异的嚎叫从瓦砾中冲出。区域 A7 内的每个生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:18] 豁免，结果如下。随后，此怨灵进行先攻掷骰。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响，获得对“混乱对峙”的24小时暂时免疫，并意识到展示具威吓性的支配力或许能平息幽灵狗头人的袭击。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 1轮，且获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 2轮，且获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}。

Trigger A creature enters a square either fully or partially filled with rubble in the middle of the room

Effect Six ghostly kobolds surge out of the rubble with eerie yowls. Each creature in area A7 must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save with the following results. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected, is temporarily immune to Confusing Confrontation for 24 hours, and realizes that a display of intimidating dominance might quell the ghostly kobolds' assault.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 2 rounds and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Stonescale Spirits.disable:
@Check[intimidation|dc:18|name:惊吓灵体] (trained) 通过威胁性的展示来惊吓灵体，或 @Check[religion|dc:21|name:驱逐灵体] (trained) 通过宗教检定来驱逐灵体

@Check[intimidation|dc:18|name:Frighten the Spirits] (trained) to frighten the spirits with a threatening display, or @Check[religion|dc:21|name:Excorcise the Spirits] (trained) to exorcise the spirits
Stonescale Spirits.hazarddescription:
半打幽魂般的狗头人从瓦砾中升起，置身于一阵呼啸的漩涡之中。

A half-dozen ghostly kobolds rise from the rubble in a howling vortex.
Stonescale Spirits.reset:
如果在其回合开始时，A7区域内没有恐惧的生物，则此灾祸会停用。幽灵般的狗头人会回到瓦砾堆中。

此灾祸在1小时内无法再次启动。

The haunt deactivates if there are no frightened creatures in area A7 at the start of its turn. The ghostly kobolds return to the rubble pile.

The haunt can't activate again for 1 hour.
Stonescale Spirits.routine:
（1动作）灵体俯冲并汇聚，朝向A7区域内一个处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}的生物，灌输背叛与困惑的感觉。目标受到@Damage[(1d10+4)[mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:18|basic] 意志豁免）。

(1 action) The spirits swoop together toward one creature in area A7 who's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, instilling feelings of betrayal and confusion. The target takes @Damage[(1d10+4)[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:18|basic] save).

Watching Wall.name: 偷窥墙 Watching Wall

Someone is Watching.name: 身后有眼 Someone is Watching
Someone is Watching.description:
触发 一名活着的生物在C4区域内停留至少1轮

效果 一股压倒性的狂乱偏执浪潮充满C4区域。房间内的每个生物必须尝试一次@Check[will|dc:25]意志豁免，结果如下。随后，一只诡异的红眼在西侧墙壁的中央睁开，环视房间，而该祟灵掷骰先攻。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}，并在其保持恐惧时，感觉仿佛有人或某物在注视着它。

失败 该生物变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}，并在其保持恐惧时，不将任何人视为盟友。

大失败 该生物变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}，并在其保持恐惧时，处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}状态。

Trigger A living creature remains in area C4 for at least 1 round

Effect An overwhelming wave of paranoia fills area C4. Each creature in the room must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save, with the following results. An eerie red eye then opens in the center of the western wall, looking about the room, and the haunt rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} and feels like someone or something is watching them for as long as they remain frightened.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and treats no one as an ally as long as they remain frightened.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} as long as they remain frightened.

Watching Wall.disable:
@Check[deception|dc:22|name:显得毫不起眼|traits:haunt]（受训）以显得毫不起眼于注视的眼睛（从而被它忽视），或 @Check[religion|dc:22|name:防止被看见|traits:haunt]（受训）以防止被那只眼睛看见或影响。

@Check[deception|dc:22|name:Appear Uninteresting|traits:haunt] (trained) to appear uninteresting to the watching eye (and thus be ignored by it) or @Check[religion|dc:22|name:Ward Against Being Seen|traits:haunt] (trained) to ward against being seen by or affected by the eye.
Watching Wall.hazarddescription:
一股被监视的强烈感觉在房间里所有人的脑海中涌起，就在下一瞬间，西侧墙壁上睁开了一只诡异的红色眼睛。

An overwhelming feeling of being watched wells up in the minds of those in the room, an instant before an eerie red eye opens in the western wall.
Watching Wall.reset:
在任意一轮结束时，若该灵异无法看见任何处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧} 状态的生物，则该灵异会变为惰性。它会保持休眠 1 小时，之后会重置。

The haunt becomes inert at the end of any round in which there are no @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} creatures it can see. It stays dormant for 1 hour, after which point it resets.
Watching Wall.routine:
（1动作）眼睛环顾四周，它能看见的那些生物（无论在C4区域内还是在区域外）受到 @Damage[4d6[mental]] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:21|basic|traits:haunt] 豁免），被注视的恐惧术带来阵阵痛楚的涟漪。

因该效果而受到精神伤害的生物，在其下个回合结束时不降低其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 数值。

(1 action) The eye glances about, and those it can see (whether in area C4 or outside of it) take @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage (@Check[will|dc:21|basic|traits:haunt] save) as fears of being watched impart ripples of pain.

A creature that takes mental damage from this effect doesn't reduce their @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} value at the end of their next turn.

Violet Fungus.name: 紫罗兰真菌 Violet Fungus

Violet Rot.name: 紫罗兰腐朽 Violet Rot
Violet Rot.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

最大持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害 外加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害 外加 虚弱 1 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害 外加 虚弱 1 和 Drain 1（1 轮）

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage plus enfeebled 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage plus enfeebled 1 and drained 1 (1 round)

Violet Fungus.publicNotes:
乍一看，紫色真菌似乎不过是一朵体型异常、外观丑陋且紫得令人作呕的蘑菇而已。只有当人们靠近——当那滴落着腐肉毒液的鞭状触手从真菌坑洼的菌盖下蜿蜒伸出——这株食肉伞菌的可怖真相才会显现。许多业余洞穴探险者都曾在这头怪物般真菌的触手钳制下不幸丧命，因为在格拉利昂，紫色真菌几乎就是洞窟的代名词。

任何曾长时间冒险深入世界洞穴的人，都知道致命紫色真菌的危险。幽暗地域的居民，例如卓尔与灰矮人，往往身带至少一次与这种凶残植物那残酷、浸满毒液的触手擦身而过所留下的细长鞭痕。精明的地下陷阱师与斥候有时会利用人工培育的紫色真菌，在地表世界之下的巨大洞窟中捕捉猎物。有些幽暗地域的族群也会栽培紫色真菌，用以保卫他们的领地。尤其是地蜥人（特征），会在其聚居地的周边布置紫色真菌，作为第一道防线。

At a glance, a violet fungus might seem to be little more than an unsightly and sickeningly purple mushroom of unusual size. Only once one draws closer-once whip-like tentacles dripping with flesh-rotting venom slither out from the fungus's cratered cap-does the terrifying truth of this carnivorous toadstool become apparent. Many amateur spelunkers have met untimely ends in the clutches of this monstrous fungus's tentacles, since violet fungi are practically synonymous with caverns on Golarion.

Anyone who has ever braved the world's caves for an extended period of time know the dangers of the deadly violet fungus. Darklands dwellers such as drow and duergars often bear the long, whip-like scars of at least one brush with this vicious plant's cruel, poison-infused tentacles. Canny subterranean trappers and scouts sometimes make use of cultivated violent fungi to catch game in the enormous caverns below the surface world. Some Darklands peoples also cultivate violet fungi as a means to defend their territory. Xulgaths in particular place violet fungi around the perimeters of their settlements as a first line of defense.

Doom's of Tomorrow - Burning City.tokenName: 明日的厄运 Doom's of Tomorrow

Apocalypse Beam.name: 天启射线 Apocalypse Beam
Apocalypse Beam.description:
触发 一个生物快步进入立体模型壁龛背面10英尺范围内

效果 陷阱向该生物发射其对应的天启射线。

Trigger A creature steps within 10 feet of the back of a diorama alcove

Effect The trap fires its corresponding apocalypse beam at that creature.

Burning Beam.name: 燃烧光束 Burning Beam
Burning Beam.description:
一名生物触发了天启射线且位于10尺内。这是反应动作（）的一部分。

A creature triggerd Apocalypse Beam and is within 10 feet. This is part of the Reaction.

Doom's of Tomorrow - Burning City.disable:
• 两个选项

  1. DC 20 盗窃（受训）以在凄凉灯塔的模型触发之前迅速将其解除

  • DC 23 潜行（受训）以悄悄绕过一个陷阱而不触发它

  • Two Options

  1. DC 20 Thievery (trained) to quickly deactivate the model of Gauntlight before it triggers

  • DC 23 Stealth (trained) to creep by a trap without triggering it
Doom's of Tomorrow - Burning City.hazarddescription:
一个小型立体模型，展示了一座城市正面临悲惨的危难。

毁灭的声响从立体模型中传出，一道闪烁的能量光束从凄凉灯塔的微型模型中射出，直刺外界。

在一名玩家查看立体模型后朗读

立体模型呈现出一幅场景：艾巴萨罗姆城在贝科拉的想象中陷入一种奇诡的毁灭。你看到微弱的幻象火焰闪烁着，吞没整座城市。

一座小小的凄凉灯塔，仿佛相距数里之遥，坐落在每一幕场景的边缘。

A small diorama of a city facing a tragic peril.

The sounds of devastation rise from the diorama, and a beam of shimmering energy lances outward from the tiny model of Gauntlight.

Read after a player looks at the diorama

The diorama presents a scene depicting the city of Absalom in a fanciful doom from Belcorra’s imagination. You see a minor illusion of flames flickering and engulfing the city.

A tiny Gauntlight, as though miles distant, sits at the edge of each scene.
Doom's of Tomorrow - Burning City.reset:
立体模型陷阱会在1小时后自动重置。

The diorama trap resets automatically after 1 hour.
